creator: xistence@0x58.com
text:
I am attempting to scan using

iwm0@pci0:5:0:0:	class=0x028000 card=0x21108086 chip=0x24fb8086 rev=0x10 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'Dual Band Wireless-AC 3168NGW [Stone Peak]'
    class      = network

dmesg output:

Autoloading module: if_iwm.ko
iwm0: <Intel(R) Dual Band Wireless AC 3168> mem 0xba100000-0xba101fff irq 25 at device 0.0 on pci5
iwm0: hw rev 0x220, fw ver 22.361476.0, address 18:56:80:78:82:78

Running the following commands

ifconfig wlan create wlandev iwm0
ifconfig wlan0 up scan
ifconfig wlan0 list scan

Does not return any of the networks in range (and there are plenty!)

I put the network card into debug mode, using sysctl, and re-ran it again. It seems to only add two channels to the list, and seems to go nowhere from there.

I have not yet tried joining an existing network.

This is on an ASRock X399 Taichi motherboard

Debug output follows:
